[{"action": "createScreenGui", "name": "ClickerGui", "parent": "StarterGui"}, {"action": "createTextButton", "name": "ClickButton", "parent": "ClickerGui", "properties": {"Size": [0.2, 0.1], "Position": [0.4, 0.4], "Text": "Click!", "BackgroundColor3": [1, 1, 1]}}, {"action": "createTextBox", "name": "ScoreDisplay", "parent": "ClickerGui", "properties": {"Size": [0.2, 0.05], "Position": [0.4, 0.2], "Text": "Score: 0", "ReadOnly": true, "BackgroundColor3": [1, 1, 1]}}, {"action": "createLocalScript", "name": "ClickerScript", "parent": "ClickButton", "script": "-- LocalScript inside ClickButton

local button = script.Parent
local scoreDisplay = button.Parent:WaitForChild("ScoreDisplay")
local score = 0

button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    score = score + 1
    scoreDisplay.Text = "Score: " .. score
end)
"}]
